hero.title_html:
Your digital assets,
now can do more.
hero.subtitle: The next-generation crypto payment platform. Visa & Mastercard virtual cards, global eSIM, and seamless fiat on/off ramps.

features.title: Unleash the Power of Crypto
features.subtitle: Everything you need for global spending and digital asset management in one app.
features.card1_desc: Visa & Mastercard supported. Spend your crypto globally at millions of merchants. Instant issuance.
features.card2_desc: Stay connected in 137+ countries. Purchase with crypto, activate instantly without physical SIMs.
features.card3_desc: Direct bank transfers with licensed partners. Secure and compliant large-volume crypto-to-fiat conversions.
features.card4_desc: Send money as easily as sending a message. Red packets, gifts, and zero-fee P2P transfers.

cardShowcase.title: Choose Your Cards
cardShowcase.subtitle: Physical or virtual. Visa or Mastercard. We have you covered.
cardShowcase.virtual_desc: 1-minute instant issuance, ready for online shopping and global SaaS subscriptions.
cardShowcase.physical_desc: Premium physical Visa card. Zero international transaction fees at ATMs and POS terminal transactions globally.

esim.title: Global Connectivity with eSIM
esim.subtitle: No physical cards, no roaming fees. Stay connected wherever you land.
esim.desc2: Pay with USDT and activate instantly via QR code.
esim.desc3: Flexible data packages tailored for digital nomads.

partners.title: UUPAY Partner Program
partners.subtitle: Share the platform and earn up to 50% commission for every referral.

promotions.title: Limited-Time Offers
promotions.subtitle: Exclusive rewards for early adopters.
promotions.promo1_desc: Get a virtual card for only 1 USDT and receive 1 USDT cashback instantly.
promotions.promo2_desc: Enjoy zero deposit and top-up transaction fees during the promotional period.

download.title: Download UUPAY App
download.subtitle: Scan the QR code or choose your store to download the app and begin.

footer.desc: Your Digital Assets Can Do More. The next-generation crypto payment platform.
